description: Use this API to return the number of array entries required to accommodate the data to be returned by the remaining members of the VSC dc line converter data family. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, buses = avscdcconvcount(sid, ties, flag)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem converter buses of vsc dc lines to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem vsc dc line converters to include. (input; 1 by default).

return_values.name: buses
return_values.description: Number of array entries required for the subsystem indicated by sid that meet the editing criteria indicated by ties and flag. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for each end of interior subsystem VSC dc lines only.
for the subsystem bus end of tie VSC dc lines only.
for the non-subsystem bus end of tie VSC dc lines only.
for each end of tie VSC dc lines only.
for each end of interior subsystem VSC dc lines and the subsystem bus end of tie VSC dc lines.
for each end of interior subsystem VSC dc lines and tie VSC dc lines.

flag.description: for only in-service converters of in-service VSC dc lines.
for all converters of in-service VSC dc lines.
for all converters of all VSC dc lines.

error_codes.description: Working case is empty; BUSES returned as 0.
Invalid SID value; BUSES returned as 0.
Invalid TIES value; BUSES returned as 0.
Invalid FLAG value; BUSES returned as 0.
